display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: The Gold Gypsies make a discovery that could finally catapult their season. Meanwhile, the Victoria Diggers hit red tape, pushing Neville to the edge.

programme.title: Extinct Or Alive
programme.desc: Forrest returns to his childhood home in Zimbabwe searching for the extinct Cape lion after numerous sightings of a similar size lion with a black mane.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: The crew of the Wizard face a life-or-death situation when a deckhand collapses. On the Seabrooke, Scott is determined to win the captain's wager - but at what cost.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: In a rush to help their collapsed greenhorn, the Wizard crew calls in a Coast Guard helicopter, and the remaining fleet race to haul crab ahead of the hurricane.

programme.title: Devil's Canyon
programme.desc: John's plans are derailed when a tree crushes his shelter. Ben finds the best dig site he's ever seen and Boyce's only shot at gold leaves him with dire options.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: In Siberia, Josh Gates investigates the strange and brutal cold case of the Dyatlov Pass Incident, where nine Soviet hikers died suspiciously in 1959.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh Gates faces harsh conditions whilst investigating the Dyatlov Pass Incident, where nine hikers died in unexplained circumstances.

programme.title: Alaska: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: In Hawaii, the Raneys rescue a young family with a crumbling cabin on a homestead infested by slugs carrying a brain-eating parasite.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: Sweltering temperatures and a waterlogged mine threaten to unravel The Digi Diggers' season-long dream. The Cheals' starter motor fails on their wash plant.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: The Bushmen put their lives on the line in the most dangerous mine they have ever worked. Plus, the Cheal's first dig of the season grinds to a halt.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: When Sig rejects Jake's partnership offer, it sparks an intense feud between the pair. Plus, Josh Harris works hard to prove himself as captain of his father's boat.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The crew helps Jedi turn a pontoon boat into a 'cabinboat,' complete with a deck, bathroom and bedroom. This floating build is packed with surprises.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: In West Virginia, the crew play a big part of a small town's post-flood revival as they build a log cabin and timber frame.

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: The Gold Timers negotiate a lucrative deal to sell their mining rights. Torrential summer storms in Victoria threaten to shut down the Poseidon Crew's operation.

programme.title: Naked And Afraid
programme.desc: A pair of complete strangers find themselves stranded in and quite literally exposed to one of the world's most extreme weather environments.

programme.title: Naked And Afraid
programme.desc: AK, a past survivalist, returns for her chance at redemption. Her partner Jason joins her in tackling the jungle of Guyana, but the two have different priorities.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawg team travels to Free Will House in Huntington, West Virginia. They salvage a bathtub, sitz bath and kitchen cabinets.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs
programme.desc: Mike, Robert and the team travel to the Rural Retreat Historical Society. While Robert salvages a vault door, Mike sets up rigging from the rooftop.

programme.title: Gold Divers
programme.desc: Shawn tries to convince potential investors on his Megadredge vision. Kris frays Andy's nerves and Zeke releases a secret weapon, but faces a sudden challenge.

programme.title: Gold Divers
programme.desc: To fund the Megadredge, Shawn races to the Bluff with only a day left in the season. Kris hits the best gold of his life, but his shoddy gear lets him down.

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: The Poseidon Crew receive devastating news about their mining permits. The Dust Devils gamble big on a quartz reef. Shane and Russell strike gold.

programme.title: Extinct Or Alive
programme.desc: Forrest travels to rural Columbia trekking into the lawless bush in search of a unique crocodilian species, the Rio Apaporis caiman.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: A treacherous arctic hurricane decimates the crab grounds, forcing captains Elliot Neese and Scott Campbell Jr to face some of their toughest decisions yet.

programme.title: Devil's Canyon
programme.desc: Ben's season may be saved with a kill, but gold proves elusive. John finds a promising dig site but his stamina is fading. Boyce must move 500lbs of gear.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: The Search For Florida's Lost Pirate. Josh heads to Florida chasing the long-lost treasure of pirate Jose Gaspar. He joins marine archaeologists and treasure hunters in the search.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: After a potential new breakthrough, Josh returns to Guatemala, searching for a snake king tomb. Using new technology, he hopes to find the tomb's location.

programme.title: Alaska: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: The Raneys rescue a family descended from rock'n'roll royalty by reclaiming their homestead from the jungle on Kauai. But a dangerous flash flood causes issues.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: Between A Rod And A Hard Place. A rookie miner gets trapped down a mine shaft. A dust storm forces the Blacklights to reluctantly return to the failed Land of Promise money pit.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: After ratter thieves raid their mine, the Misfits, Angel and rookie miner, Cody, struggle to find an opal king stone to fulfil an order for a buyer.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Jake becomes suspicious of Captain Keith's true intentions when he offers to take him on as an apprentice. Plus, Sig plots his revenge against his newest rival, Jake.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Sean and Casey forge an alliance but when one strikes crab, will he betray it? Plus, will Wild Bill's risky new bait and fishing strategy pay off big.

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: Josh wants to investigate ghostly sightings and terrifying sounds coming from an abandoned canal along the Potomac. What will they uncover.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh concludes his investigation into the mysterious Maya city of El Mirador, including the possible burial of the Snake Kings.

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: In the Pilbara region, the Ferals hit a run of nuggets that could transform their season. Meanwhile, the Gold Retrievers are rocked by a medical emergency.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: Remarkable stories of people who have experienced God's blessings.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: POOF! Bye Bye Under Eye Bags!
programme.desc: Plexaderm helps reduce Under Eye Bags, Dark Circles, and Wrinkles in just 10 minutes!

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Boy Meets World
programme.desc: Topanga's suggestion that the Matthews family celebrates Christmas her way prompts Cory to ponder whether she has too much control in his life.

programme.title: Boy Meets World
programme.desc: Cory attempts to show his dad that he wants their relationship to be more like Alan and Eric's.

programme.title: Boy Meets World
programme.desc: Cory and Shawn search for Super Bowl tickets; Eric ends up with a date who is more compatible with Jack.

programme.title: Boy Meets World
programme.desc: Cory becomes attracted to a young lady who helps take care of him after he sprains his ankle during a ski trip.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: Inspiring stories of miracles and answered prayers from around the world.

programme.title: 700 Club Interactive
programme.desc: Highlighting current events and stories that will help bring encouragment to people.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: A chance meeting in the supermarket lets Jim in on Cheryl's secret: though she says the doctor told her to stay in bed, her doctor actually wants her to be active.

programme.title: The Rescuers
programme.desc: Bernard and Miss Bianca, two New York City mice, are members of the Rescue Aid Society, an international team that operates beneath the United Nations and comes to the aid of those in need. After receiving word that Penny, a young orphan, has been abducted by Madame Medusa, an evil woman seeking a precious diamond, the two set out to bring her back home, with help from other animal friends.

programme.title: The Rescuers Down Under
programme.desc: Cody (Adam Ryen), a boy living in the Australian outback, frees a rare golden eagle from a trap. When an evil poacher (George C. Scott) kidnaps Cody to catch the eagle, a group of local animals contacts the Rescue Aid Society in New York City, who assign their top mice, Bernard (Bob Newhart) and Bianca (Eva Gabor), to the case. To save Cody and the eagle, the agents fly to Australia on a clumsy al

programme.title: Peter Rabbit 2: The Runaway
programme.desc: Bea, Thomas and the rabbits have created a makeshift family, but despite his best efforts, Peter can't seem to shake his mischievous reputation. Venturing out of the garden, Peter finds himself in a world where his mischief is appreciated. However, when his family risks everything to come looking for him, Peter must figure out what kind of bunny he wants to be.

programme.title: Freaky Friday
programme.desc: Single mother Tess Coleman (Jamie Lee Curtis) and her teenage daughter Anna (Lindsay Lohan) couldn't be more different, and it is driving them both insane. After receiving cryptic fortunes at a Chinese restaurant, the two wake up the next day to discover that they have somehow switched bodies. Unable to switch back, they are forced to masquerade as one another until a solution can be found. In the

programme.title: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: Twins Annie and Hallie are strangers until happenstance unites them. The preteen girls' divorced parents, Nick and Elizabeth are living on opposite sides of the Atlantic, each with one child. After meeting at camp, American Hallie and British-raised Annie engineer an identity swap, giving both the chance to spend time with the parent they've missed. If the scheme works, it might just make the fami

programme.title: Raising Chelsea
programme.desc: Trying to conceive proves less glamorous than expected, and Sophie's dreams of a baby clash with Jamie's fear of adulthood. When Sophie announces she's pregnant, it's panic for Jamie, but first heartbeats, scans and a scare make it real.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: Inspiring stories of miracles and answered prayers from around the world.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Cheryl asks Jim to put the kids' artwork in storage, but he disposes of it elsewhere, thinking Cheryl will not notice.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim agrees to go to a couples seminar, hoping Cheryl will reciprocate by letting him go on a fishing trip with Andy.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim develops a friendship with Dana's new boyfriend, despite the fact that the guy dumped Cheryl years ago.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Cheryl protests when a heat wave sends the family sneaking into a vacationing neighbor's pool - until she starts sneaking over on her own.

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Accident Compensation: Get Help Now!
programme.desc: Helping injured individuals get the compensation they are owed.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: Inspiring stories of miracles and answered prayers from around the world.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Boy Meets World
programme.desc: Cory's dishonesty angers Topanga on Valentine's Day; three of Shawn's former girlfriends decide to protect Angela.

programme.title: Boy Meets World
programme.desc: Cory must decide whether to stay with Topanga or go out with the new girl that he met on the class ski trip.

programme.title: Boy Meets World
programme.desc: Shawn turns his attention to a new girl (Jennifer Love Hewitt) at school.

programme.title: Boy Meets World
programme.desc: Shawn tries to intervene when Cory starts drinking to deal with losing Topanga.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: Amazing stories of people who have experienced God's blessings.

programme.title: 700 Club Interactive
programme.desc: Highlighting current events and stories that will help bring encouragment to people.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: The devil (James Lipton) comes to collect on a deal Jim made with him back when Jim was courting Cheryl.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim guilts the older kids into doing household chores after Jonathan's special blanket goes missing.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit 2: The Runaway
programme.desc: Bea, Thomas and the rabbits have created a makeshift family, but despite his best efforts, Peter can't seem to shake his mischievous reputation. Venturing out of the garden, Peter finds himself in a world where his mischief is appreciated. However, when his family risks everything to come looking for him, Peter must figure out what kind of bunny he wants to be.

programme.title: Dr. Seuss' Horton Hears a Who!
programme.desc: Animated elephant Horton finds a speck of dust floating in the Jungle of Nool. Upon investigation of the speck, Horton discovers the tiny city of Whoville and its residents, the Whos, which he can hear but cannot see. Horton forms a friendship with the mayor of Whoville, Ned McDodd, and promises to transport Whoville to safety. However, Horton encounters opposition from his jungle neighbors, who d

programme.title: Pocahontas
programme.desc: This is the Disney animated tale of the romance between a young American Indian woman named Pocahontas (Irene Bedard) and Capt. John Smith (Mel Gibson), who journeyed to the New World with other settlers to begin fresh lives. Her powerful father, Chief Powhatan, disapproves of their relationship and wants her to marry a native warrior. Meanwhile, Smith's fellow Englishmen hope to rob the Native Am

programme.title: Frozen
programme.desc: When their kingdom becomes trapped in perpetual winter, fearless Anna (Kristen Bell) joins forces with mountaineer Kristoff (Jonathan Groff) and his reindeer sidekick to find Anna's sister, Snow Queen Elsa (Idina Menzel), and break her icy spell. Although their epic journey leads them to encounters with mystical trolls, a comedic snowman (Josh Gad), harsh conditions, and magic at every turn, Anna

programme.title: Frozen II
programme.desc: Elsa the Snow Queen has an extraordinary gift -- the power to create ice and snow. But no matter how happy she is to be surrounded by the people of Arendelle, Elsa finds herself strangely unsettled. After hearing a mysterious voice call out to her, Elsa travels to the enchanted forests and dark seas beyond her kingdom -- an adventure that soon turns into a journey of self-discovery.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Janet convinces Michael to have a procedure during a physical examination.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: The kids get more than they bargained for after Jr. dares Claire to eat Michael's slice of lemon meringue pie.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: After a bad business decision costs Jay her job, she becomes a homemaker.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael and Janet's romantic overtures are seen on the Internet after Jr. gets new computer equipment.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Kady treats the school hamster that Michael accidentally killed as though it is still alive; Michael catches Claire in a lie.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael takes living life to its fullest a little too far after his accountant (Doug Banks) unexpectedly dies.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael is left in charge of the house when Janet leaves to tend to her sick mother, and must contend with multiple problems.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael contends with multiple problems, including a positive pregnancy test, a sad 6-year-old and Jr.'s basketball troubles.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: The household becomes unbearable when Michael decides to let the kids do as they please.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Fed up with Michael's parenting style, the children confront their father with a description of the ideal dad.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: When Janet returns, Michael remains silent about her obvious weight gain.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael looks to teach Claire a lesson after she sneaks out of the house and uses Kady as an accomplice.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Janet convinces Michael to have a procedure during a physical examination.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: The kids get more than they bargained for after Jr. dares Claire to eat Michael's slice of lemon meringue pie.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: After a bad business decision costs Jay her job, she becomes a homemaker.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael and Janet's romantic overtures are seen on the Internet after Jr. gets new computer equipment.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Kady treats the school hamster that Michael accidentally killed as though it is still alive; Michael catches Claire in a lie.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael is thrilled when the children start their own businesses after squandering their allowances in one day.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Marriage counselors back Michael's belief that he's entitled to some time alone after spending time with Janet, much to her dismay.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael tries to get his always-tardy family dressed and out the door to a wedding within just 15 minutes.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: A family trip to Paul Revere's house tests everyone's nerves.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael is even more disillusioned about eating out after Janet convinces him to go to a Japanese restaurant.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: The war between the Tylers and Kyles continue in the restaurant, with everyone nearly going at it with each other.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael agrees to let Claire go on her first date with Tony, but only on condition that it is a double date with Janet and himself.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael's parents come to visit him, but he is worried about the way they treat each other and how it reflects on his own children; after a disastrous attempt to fix things, Michael and Jay decide to let things the way they are.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Junior asks Michael for boxing lessons so he can protect his sister's honor.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael steps in to save Kady's soccer team from Janet's overbearing coaching style.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael seeks advice from Junior on how to handle Janet's office persona; the cast re-enacts scenes from the movie "E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial.".

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Janet and Michael are astounded when their often dim-witted son shines on an IQ test, ranking him as a genius.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael is thrilled when the children start their own businesses after squandering their allowances in one day.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Marriage counselors back Michael's belief that he's entitled to some time alone after spending time with Janet, much to her dismay.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael tries to get his always-tardy family dressed and out the door to a wedding within just 15 minutes.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: A family trip to Paul Revere's house tests everyone's nerves.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael is even more disillusioned about eating out after Janet convinces him to go to a Japanese restaurant.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: The war between the Tylers and Kyles continue in the restaurant, with everyone nearly going at it with each other.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael agrees to let Claire go on her first date with Tony, but only on condition that it is a double date with Janet and himself.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael's parents come to visit him, but he is worried about the way they treat each other and how it reflects on his own children; after a disastrous attempt to fix things, Michael and Jay decide to let things the way they are.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Junior asks Michael for boxing lessons so he can protect his sister's honor.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael steps in to save Kady's soccer team from Janet's overbearing coaching style.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael seeks advice from Junior on how to handle Janet's office persona; the cast re-enacts scenes from the movie "E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial.".

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Janet and Michael are astounded when their often dim-witted son shines on an IQ test, ranking him as a genius.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: After the children tease him about getting old, Michael pretends to injure his back playing Twister so they will have to cater to his every whim.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: An encounter with Michael's ex-girlfriend prompts Janet to get a makeover; on a dare, Junior tries to steal a bra from the girls' locker room.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael bowls against his archenemy Stu Tyler (Larry Miller); Trekkies at the bowling alley believe Claire is a Romulan queen.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: After getting his driver's license, Jr. buys a clunker instead of the practical car Michael picked out for him.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Janet thinks Michael plans to golf on their anniversary, but he arranges to have Brian McKnight sing for them at a surprise ceremony to renew their vows.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Janet thinks Michael plans to golf on their anniversary, but he arranges to have Brian McKnight sing for them at a surprise ceremony to renew their vows.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: In order to save money, Michael books a 43-hour flight to Hawaii with several layovers; Michael chastises Janet for packing too many clothes.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: In Hawaii, Michael and Janet are pursued by two attractive strangers (Nicole Scherzinger, Tyson C. Beckford); Claire goes on a shopping spree.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael discovers the family's flight home from Hawaii leaves much earlier than he thought; Claire tries to hide her costly hotel charges.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael and Janet try to spice up their date nights by taking samba lessons, but their instructors arouse jealousy.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Janet learns that Claire is thinking about having sex with her boyfriend; Jr. is an irresponsible driver.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Rebellious Claire rejects the boyfriend her father likes and takes up with one he views with disfavor.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: After the children tease him about getting old, Michael pretends to injure his back playing Twister so they will have to cater to his every whim.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: An encounter with Michael's ex-girlfriend prompts Janet to get a makeover; on a dare, Junior tries to steal a bra from the girls' locker room.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael bowls against his archenemy Stu Tyler (Larry Miller); Trekkies at the bowling alley believe Claire is a Romulan queen.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: After getting his driver's license, Jr. buys a clunker instead of the practical car Michael picked out for him.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Janet thinks Michael plans to golf on their anniversary, but he arranges to have Brian McKnight sing for them at a surprise ceremony to renew their vows.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Janet thinks Michael plans to golf on their anniversary, but he arranges to have Brian McKnight sing for them at a surprise ceremony to renew their vows.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: In order to save money, Michael books a 43-hour flight to Hawaii with several layovers; Michael chastises Janet for packing too many clothes.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: In Hawaii, Michael and Janet are pursued by two attractive strangers (Nicole Scherzinger, Tyson C. Beckford); Claire goes on a shopping spree.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael discovers the family's flight home from Hawaii leaves much earlier than he thought; Claire tries to hide her costly hotel charges.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael and Janet try to spice up their date nights by taking samba lessons, but their instructors arouse jealousy.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Janet learns that Claire is thinking about having sex with her boyfriend; Jr. is an irresponsible driver.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Rebellious Claire rejects the boyfriend her father likes and takes up with one he views with disfavor.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Janet's overzealous direction of the school play is cause for concern for Kady's kindergarten teacher.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael and Jay give their bickering kids a taste of their own medicine, making them scared they're on the brink of breaking up.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael's sister (Vivica A. Fox) visits and sparks a rivalry with Jay.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael's advice about women backfires when Jr. ends up with two dates to a dance; Jay dreams Michael is having an affair with Janet Jackson.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: When Michael inspires Jay's artistic side, she makes him pose for a nude painting that makes him the subject of everyone's jokes.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael is caught by surprise when his childhood friend, Tommy, shows up for a visit in a wheelchair.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Jay insists that Michael attend a couples' seminar with her; Jr. and his friends try to make some extra money.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael volunteers to be chief for Kady's Indian Princess sleepover and tries to keep Claire from sneaking out to a rave with her boyfriend.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael finally gets the house to himself when a blackout occurs.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael is disheartened when he does not win the Small Businessman of the Year award.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael and Jay return home to find Jr. and his girlfriend (Meagan Good) fooling around in their bed.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: A furious Michael considers throwing Jr. out of the house after catching him in a compromising position with his girlfriend (Meagan Good).

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Janet's overzealous direction of the school play is cause for concern for Kady's kindergarten teacher.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael and Jay give their bickering kids a taste of their own medicine, making them scared they're on the brink of breaking up.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael's sister (Vivica A. Fox) visits and sparks a rivalry with Jay.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael's advice about women backfires when Jr. ends up with two dates to a dance; Jay dreams Michael is having an affair with Janet Jackson.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: When Michael inspires Jay's artistic side, she makes him pose for a nude painting that makes him the subject of everyone's jokes.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Charlie and Rex are in deep water after a university rower is shot by a sniper during team practice.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Cultures clash when the death of a Parisian journalist has Charlie and Rex partnering with a French detective in an investigation that whisks the team to Saint Pierre and Miquelon.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Charlie and Rex follow the route of a killer after a tech engineer is found dead in her company's self-driving car.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When a prominent member of an exclusive dating app is found with an arrow through his heart, Charlie must go undercover in the online dating scene.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When the circumstances of a murder appear to mimic a contentious crime from twenty years earlier, Charlie and Rex must connect the past to the present while fending off a true crime podcaster.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Charlie and Rex head underground into an allegedly haunted mine after a crew member turns up dead during a horror film shoot.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Charlie and Rex follow the route of a killer after a tech engineer is found dead in her company's self-driving car.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When a prominent member of an exclusive dating app is found with an arrow through his heart, Charlie must go undercover in the online dating scene.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When the circumstances of a murder appear to mimic a contentious crime from twenty years earlier, Charlie and Rex must connect the past to the present while fending off a true crime podcaster.

programme.desc: Charlie and Rex head underground into an allegedly haunted mine after a crew member turns up dead during a horror film shoot.

programme.desc: Charlie and Rex follow the route of a killer after a tech engineer is found dead in her company's self-driving car.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When a prominent member of an exclusive dating app is found with an arrow through his heart, Charlie must go undercover in the online dating scene.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a young woman dies a slow and painful death from an untreated infection, Cosgrove and Shaw suspect she was under the influence of a powerful cult; Price and Maroun put pressure on its members to find the cult's true mastermind.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Devastating repressed memories come back to a woman when she finds an old notebook in her family home; bringing charges in a decades-old crime proves even more difficult for Carisi when a powerful judge stalls the case.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a young woman dies a slow and painful death from an untreated infection, Cosgrove and Shaw suspect she was under the influence of a powerful cult; Price and Maroun put pressure on its members to find the cult's true mastermind.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Cosgrove and Shaw investigate the murder of a physician whose politician wife suspects she was the intended target; Price and Maroun's case hangs in the balance when the defense calls one of the doctor's young patients to testify as a witness.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Devastating repressed memories come back to a woman when she finds an old notebook in her family home; bringing charges in a decades-old crime proves even more difficult for Carisi when a powerful judge stalls the case.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A romantic date ends with a teenager fighting for her life in the hospital; Carisi can't help bringing the case home with him as he envisions the dangers ahead for his growing daughters.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: As they prepare to attend an exclusive event on the vampire social calendar, the vampires try to survive without Guillermo.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: Guillermo's fate hangs in the balance as the vampires receive a promotion.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: A forbidden artifact is used to help Nandor court a health club employee.

programme.desc: An old flame returns, and an ancient vehicle is resurrected.

programme.desc: Charlie and Rex head underground into an allegedly haunted mine after a crew member turns up dead during a horror film shoot.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Charlie and Rex investigate the long list of enemies surrounding a vitriolic celebrity chef after a finger turns up in his Beef Wellington.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Charlie is unable to let a serial arsonist case rest, even when he is in the hospital with a broken leg; working from his bed, he hopes to identify the arsonist before he strikes again.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Charlie and Rex find themselves at the mercy of a dangerous crime kingpin from their past when they enlist his help on a case.

programme.desc: Cosgrove and Shaw investigate the murder of a physician whose politician wife suspects she was the intended target; Price and Maroun's case hangs in the balance when the defense calls one of the doctor's young patients to testify as a witness.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a businessman is murdered, his surprising connection to Cosgrove's daughter helps the police make a break in the case; Price and Maroun disagree on how to proceed at trial when the defendant's age brings up legal precedent they must follow.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A romantic date ends with a teenager fighting for her life in the hospital; Carisi can't help bringing the case home with him as he envisions the dangers ahead for his growing daughters.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A couple's dinner party ends with a violent home invasion and assault by masked men; Rollins suspects the crime is linked to her Intelligence investigation of an international gang of thieves.

programme.title: Car accident? Free Legal Consultation
programme.desc: Legal professionals standing by to answer your questions.

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Overwhelmed with IRS Debt? Keys to Resolving Tax Debt
programme.desc: See how one company is changing people's lives by helping them put their tax problems to rest.

programme.title: POOF! Bye Bye Under Eye Bags!
programme.desc: Plexaderm helps reduce Under Eye Bags, Dark Circles, and Wrinkles in just 10 minutes!

programme.title: Accident Compensation: Get Help Now!
programme.desc: Helping injured individuals get the compensation they are owed.

programme.title: 2026 Silver Eagle Is Here... & It is a Once-In-A-Lifetime Coin!
programme.desc: Join your hosts Kevin Cash & Cory Cady as we discuss the 250th Anniversary of America with the official "America 250" logo on a Silver American Eagle label; we are locking in orders for this iconic release, but coins are limited! Don't miss out!

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Cheryl disapproves of Jim's latest invention, a flatulent doll named Gassy Gus. Andrea Walters, Ben Falcone, Andre Ware and Philip Daniel Bolden guest star.

programme.title: Big
programme.desc: At a carnival, young Josh Baskin wishes he were big, only to wake up the next morning and discover his wish came true. But the more Josh experiences life as an adult, the more he longs for the simple joys of childhood.

programme.title: Lyle, Lyle, Crocodile
programme.desc: When the Primm family moves to New York City, their young son, Josh, struggles to adapt to his new school and friends. All of that changes when he discovers Lyle, a singing crocodile that loves baths, caviar and great music. The two become fast friends, but when evil neighbor Mr. Grumps threatens Lyle's existence, the Primms must band together to show the world that family can come from the most u

programme.title: The Garfield Movie
programme.desc: Garfield, the Monday-hating, lasagna-loving indoor cat, finds himself on a wild outdoor adventure when his long-lost father draws him into a high-stakes heist.

programme.title: Garfield: A Tail of Two Kitties
programme.desc: Garfield (Bill Murray) follows Jon (Breckin Meyer) to England and receives the royal treatment after he is mistaken for the heir to a grand castle. However, the feline will need all nine lives to foil the plans of evil Lord Dargis (Billy Connolly), who wants to turn the castle into a resort.

programme.title: The Garfield Movie
programme.desc: Garfield, the Monday-hating, lasagna-loving indoor cat, finds himself on a wild outdoor adventure when his long-lost father draws him into a high-stakes heist.

programme.title: Uncharted
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Victor "Sully" Sullivan recruits street-smart Nathan Drake to help him recover a 500-year-old lost fortune amassed by explorer Ferdinand Magellan. What starts out as a heist soon becomes a globe-trotting, white-knuckle race to reach the prize before the ruthless Santiago Moncada can get his hands on it. If Sully and Nate can decipher the clues and solve one of the world's oldest my

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Four high school kids discover an old video game console and are drawn into the game's jungle setting, literally becoming the adult avatars they chose. What they discover is that you don't just play Jumanji - you must survive it. To beat the game and return to the real world, they'll have to go on the most dangerous adventure of their lives, discover what Alan Parrish left 20 years ago, and change

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Four high school kids discover an old video game console and are drawn into the game's jungle setting, literally becoming the adult avatars they chose. What they discover is that you don't just play Jumanji - you must survive it. To beat the game and return to the real world, they'll have to go on the most dangerous adventure of their lives, discover what Alan Parrish left 20 years ago, and change

programme.title: Date Night
programme.desc: Dragged down by the daily grind, suburbanites Phil (Steve Carell) and Claire (Tina Fey) try to invigorate their marriage by visiting a trendy Manhattan bistro. They get more than romance when mistaken identity hurtles them into an incredible adventure involving corrupt cops, a mob boss and a crazy cab driver.

programme.title: What Happens in Vegas
programme.desc: During a wild vacation in Las Vegas, career woman Joy McNally (Cameron Diaz) and playboy Jack Fuller (Ashton Kutcher) come to the sober realization that they have married each other after a night of drunken abandon. Besides that, there is a huge jackpot at stake. An implacable judge freezes the prize money and refuses to grant an annulment, so Joy and Jack must try to make their impromptu marriage

programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: America 250th Anniversary Coins: Enduring Liberty Half Dollars
programme.desc: Join Mike Mezack for a special presentation of the 1776-2026 Enduring Liberty Half Dollars-one-year-only U.S. Mint issues honoring America's 250th Anniversary, including rare rolls and certified MS67 collectibles.

programme.title: Overwhelmed with IRS Debt? Keys to Resolving Tax Debt
programme.desc: See how one company is changing people's lives by helping them put their tax problems to rest.

programme.title: Uncharted
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Victor "Sully" Sullivan recruits street-smart Nathan Drake to help him recover a 500-year-old lost fortune amassed by explorer Ferdinand Magellan. What starts out as a heist soon becomes a globe-trotting, white-knuckle race to reach the prize before the ruthless Santiago Moncada can get his hands on it. If Sully and Nate can decipher the clues and solve one of the world's oldest my

programme.title: The Day the Earth Stood Still
programme.desc: Klaatu, an extraterrestrial visitor to planet Earth, becomes the herald of upheaval on a global scale. As the world's governments and scientists race to understand what is happening and how to stop it, Dr. Helen Benson and her stepson come to understand the chilling ramifications behind Klaatu's statement that he is a "friend to the Earth.".

programme.title: Independence Day
programme.desc: In the epic adventure film "Independence Day," strange phenomena surface around the globe. The skies ignite. Terror races through the world's major cities. As these extraordinary events unfold, it becomes increasingly clear that a force of incredible magnitude has arrived; its mission: total annihilation over the Fourth of July weekend. The last hope to stop the destruction is an unlikely group of

programme.title: Independence Day: Resurgence
programme.desc: As the Fourth of July nears, satellite engineer David Levinson (Jeff Goldblum) investigates a 3,000-mile-wide mother ship that's approaching Earth. Fortunately, 20 years earlier, nations across the world started to use recovered extraterrestrial technology to develop an immense defense program. When the alien invaders attack with unprecedented force, the U.S. president, teams of scientists and bra

programme.title: The Day After Tomorrow
programme.desc: After climatologist Jack Hall is largely ignored by U.N. officials when presenting his environmental concerns, his research proves true when a superstorm develops, setting off catastrophic natural disasters throughout the world; trying to get to his son, Sam, who is trapped in New York with his friend Laura and others, Jack and his crew must travel by foot from Philadelphia, braving the elements,

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: During the approach of the most powerful storm in decades, university professor Dr. Jo Harding (Helen Hunt) and an underfunded team of students prepares the prototype for Dorothy, a ground-breaking tornado data-gathering device conceived by her estranged husband, Bill (Bill Paxton). When Harding tells Bill that Dorothy is ready for testing -- and that their privately funded rival Dr. Jonas Miller
